note: Curated Chicago happenings: venues + coordinates hand-verified, real source URLs. Dates are representative of the summer-2026 season and labeled 'Curated' in the app — never shown as live data. Sox/Cubs home games are refreshable to verified=true via `pnpm events:mlb` (free MLB StatsAPI, no key).

events.name: Chicago Blues Festival
events.blurb: The world's largest free blues festival, three days in Millennium Park.

events.name: The Second City Mainstage
events.blurb: Sketch and improv from the stage that launched Belushi, Fey, and Colbert.

events.name: Tonight at Lincoln Hall
events.blurb: Sightlines-for-days club from the Schubas team.

events.name: Green Mill Jazz
events.blurb: Prohibition-era jazz lounge — Capone's old booth is still in the corner.

events.name: Tonight at the Empty Bottle
events.blurb: Cheap-beer dive that books tomorrow's headliners tonight.

events.name: White Sox vs. Dodgers
events.blurb: White Sox home game at Rate Field.

events.name: Tonight at House of Blues
events.blurb: Folk-art-covered River North room, steps from the river bars.

events.name: Chicago Symphony Orchestra
events.blurb: The CSO at Orchestra Hall on Michigan Avenue.

events.name: Khruangbin at The Salt Shed
events.blurb: Psych-funk trio inside the old Morton Salt warehouse on the river.

events.name: Movies in the Park: Spirited Away
events.blurb: Free outdoor screening with the skyline standing behind the screen.

events.name: Buddy Guy's Legends
events.blurb: Electric blues in the South Loop club Buddy himself owns.

events.name: Old Town Art Fair
events.blurb: Juried artists line Old Town's leafy side streets for the 65th year.

events.name: White Sox vs. Dodgers
events.blurb: White Sox home game at Rate Field.

events.name: Beach Bunny at Metro
events.blurb: Hometown indie-pop above the Cubby Bear, a block from Wrigley.

events.name: Kingston Mines Blues
events.blurb: Two stages, blues till 4am — the late-night institution of Lincoln Park.

events.name: Tonight at the Riviera
events.blurb: Faded-grandeur Uptown theatre — the balcony is worth the climb.

events.name: Navy Pier Fireworks
events.blurb: Ten-minute lakefront pyrotechnics fired straight off the water.

events.blurb: White Sox home game at Rate Field.

events.name: Tonight at Thalia Hall
events.blurb: An 1892 opera house turned the city's best-sounding rock room.
